<!--
  Thank you for contributing to NavGate! 🎉

  Please fill out this template to help reviewers understand your changes.
-->

## 📋 Pull Request Template

### Type of Change

- [ ] 🎨 **New Feature** - Adding a new capability
- [ ] 🐛 **Bug Fix** - Fixing an existing issue
- [ ] ♻️️ **Code Refactor** - Improving code quality without functional changes
- [ ] 📚 **Documentation** - Docs only (README, API docs, etc.)
- [ ] 🎨 **Style** - Code style/formatting only (no functionality changes)
- [ ] 🧪 **Test** - Adding or updating tests
- [ ] 🔧 **Build/CI** - Build/CI configuration changes
- [ ] 📦 **Performance** - Performance improvements
- [ ] 🔧 **Security** - Security patches or improvements
- [ ] 🗑️ **Chore** - Maintenance tasks (deps, cleanup, etc.)
- [ ] ✨ **Hotfix** - Critical bug fixes requiring immediate deployment

### 📋 Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of what this PR changes -->

---

## 🔗 Related Issue / PR

<!-- Link to related issue or PR number -->

Closes #[ISSUE_NUMBER]

## 📋 Change Summary

<!-- List the files changed and what changed in each -->

---

## 📋 Breaking Changes

<!-- List any breaking changes, user-facing impacts, or migration steps required -->

---

## 📋 Checklist

### Code Quality

- [ ] ✅ Code follows project coding standards
- [ ] ✅ Self-reviewed my changes
- [ ] ✅ No console.log/debugger statements
- [ ] ✅ Tested locally before pushing

### Testing

- [ ] ✅ Unit tests pass
- [ ] ✅ Integration tests pass
- [ ] ✅ Manual testing completed
- [ ] ✅ Tested on GitHub Pages mode (if applicable)
- [ ] ✅ Tested on backend mode (if applicable)

### Documentation

- [ ] ✅ README.md updated (if user-facing changes)
- [ ] ✅ API docs updated (if API changes)
      [ ] [ ] ENV_SETUP.md updated (if env var changes)

### CI/CD

- [ ] ✅ All CI checks passed (lint, format, type-check, build, test)
- [ ] ✅ Security scans passed
- [ ] ✅ Migration verification passed (if applicable)
